name: empty_audio
description: Silent/failed recording + one minimal photo — photo-driven with heavy hedging

assemblies.evidence: photo: Square D panel in garage with the door closed — a panel evaluation/tune-up is the only work supportable from this capture

allowances.description: Panel work scope (upgrade, swap, or repairs) pending an on-site evaluation
allowances.reason: The voice note recorded no audio and the single photo shows only the closed Square D panel door — amperage, condition, and intent are all unknown.

verify_flags.action: Open the dead front and document amperage, brand/series, and breaker fill.
Re-capture the dictation — the audio came through empty.

expected_scoping.scope_prose:
Your job capture came through with a photo of the Square D panel in the garage, but the voice note did not record, so the specific work you want has not been captured yet. This draft carries a panel evaluation and tune-up as the starting point, with the balance of the panel work held as an allowance until we can confirm what's needed.

Once the dictation is re-recorded or we complete an on-site evaluation — opening the panel, documenting the amperage and breaker fill, and checking overall condition — we will replace the allowance with firm line items.
questions_for_contractor: What work did the customer actually request? The audio capture was empty.
